title: Research Cross-Journal Editorial Team
gist: This is a Springer Nature staff-directory page listing the editors of the Nature Research Cross-Journal Editorial Team and their academic bios. It contains no technology research findings, market data, or investable signal.

insights.claim: Springer Nature's Research Cross-Journal Editorial Team, established January 2024 under Prateek Dongare, handles primary research manuscripts flexibly across Nature and Nature Research journals, with editors covering energy materials, catalysis, batteries, and energy storage among other fields.
insights.speaker: Nature Energy
insights.so_what: Background on Springer Nature's editorial structure; no actionable market or technology signal.
insights.locator: Head of Team / Prateek Dongare bio
